scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'token="lanternwood-$$-$(date +%s)"; LANTERNWOOD_CODEX_HEALTH_TOKEN=$token npm run dev:codex-api & api=$!; if ! LANTERNWOOD_CODEX_HEALTH_TOKEN=$token tsx server/waitForCodexHealth.ts || ! kill -0 $api 2>/dev/null; then kill $api 2>/dev/null || true; wait $api 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; npm run dev:codex; status=$?; kill $api 2>/dev/null || true; exit $status'
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run e2e
